message:
fix: Preserve var_renames in try blocks for proper TryHelper calls

When a try block uses renamed variables (e.g., function param `x` renamed
to `__p_x_0`), the TryHelper call needs to use the renamed version.

Previously, try_except.zig was overwriting var_renames entries for
read_only_vars with __local_{var} names for the helper body, then deleting
them completely after generating the try block. This destroyed the original
function parameter renames needed for the TryHelper call.

Fix: Save original var_renames entries for read_only_vars before overwriting,
and restore them after generating the try block body so they're available
for the TryHelper call.

Also removed debug logging that was accidentally left in.

test_bool: 248 tests passing
test_str: 13 tests passing
